{{CargoOrgan
|name=Ultimate Vision
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10896
|idx=107
|description=The organ is obtained by infusing embryonic stem cells with the ultimate bionic part essence, having a leap in performance.
|skill=
|hp=2470
|def=219
|atk=250
|rush=354
|gene1=Wind DMG +120
|gene2=Wind RES +120
|gene3=Against main species, CRIT +20%
|gene4=Against main species, HIT +12%
|gene5=Per Orange Coating crafted, gain +1 by +10%
|gene6=All CIV Bionic Parts, ELMT RES +2%
|gene7=Wind DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
